ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula: AND( NOT(ISNEW()), $Profile.Name <> 'SW CSM Internal', $Profile.Name <> 'SW Sales Internal', $Profile.Name <> 'System Administrator', OR( ISCHANGED(What_are_the_Before_Scenarios__c ) , ISCHANGED(What_are_the_After_Scenarios__c ) , ISCHANGED(What_are_the_Customer_s_Metrics__c ) , ISCHANGED(Solution_Fit__c ) , ISCHANGED(What_is_their_main_pain__c ) , ISCHANGED(Positive_Business_Outcome__c ) , ISCHANGED(How_do_we_solve_it__c ) ) )
ValidationRule.errorMessage: You don't have permission to edit Discovery Guide Questions
